meaning: n.瓶,长颈瓶,细颈瓶,烧瓶,小水瓶
examples: He took out a metal flask from a canvas bag.
There are some sandwiches here and a flask of coffee.
The flask is completely watertight, even when laid on its side.
But the sips he took from a hip flask during interviews told another tale.
And, while you're at it, don't forget your flask, survival suit, ice axe and crampons.
